      Supreme Pizza

      Visit
      3.5
      (2)
      ·
      30 min
      ·
      Yield: 4
      This supreme pizza recipe is easy to make at home, and you probably have a few of the ingredients ...
      This supreme pizza recipe is easy to make at home, and you probably have a few of the ingredients ...

      Ingredients

      1 pound fresh prepared pizza dough1 cup marinara (such as Rao's)2 ounces Canadian bacon slices (about 3 slices), quartered1 ounce pepperoni slices (about 15 slices)1 small (3 to 4 oz.) red bell pepper, cut into 1/4-inch-thick rounds (about 1/2 cup)

      Pizza Margherita

      Visit
      4.4
      (9)
      ·
      25 min
      ·
      Yield: 2
      This is a pizza margherita recipe from scratch.
      This is a pizza margherita recipe from scratch.

      Ingredients

      3/4 cup lukewarm water1 tsp sugar2 tsp active dry yeast2 cups all purpose flour (maida)1 tsp salt
